Concepts

This case-sensitive code system http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-TransmissionRelationshipTypeCode defines the following code in a Is-A hierarchy:

CodeDisplayDefinitioninternalIdStatus
SEQL sequence**Description:**A transmission relationship indicating that the source transmission follows the target transmission.22039active

name: TransmissionRelationshipTypeCode
title: TransmissionRelationshipTypeCode
description: **Description:**A code specifying the meaning and purpose of every TransmissionRelationship instance. Each of its values implies specific constraints to what kinds of Transmission objects can be related and in which way.
